metadata.purpose: Comprehensive knowledge base for PAHA chatbot systems

organization.name: Philippine Animal Hospital Association
organization.description: PAHA is the leading professional organization for veterinarians and animal hospitals in the Philippines, dedicated to advancing veterinary medicine and promoting animal welfare.
organization.mission: To promote excellence in veterinary medicine, advocate for animal welfare, and support the professional development of veterinarians in the Philippines.
organization.vision: A community of highly competent and compassionate veterinarians providing quality animal healthcare across the Philippines.
organization.officeAddress: 46 Pres. Quezon St., Marikina City, Philippines

officeHours.weekdays: Monday - Friday: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Philippine Standard Time)

contactMethods.bestFor: General inquiries, document submission, formal requests

overview.description: PAHA membership connects veterinarians and clinics across the Philippines, providing professional development, networking, and accreditation opportunities.
benefits: Priority registration for CPE workshops, surgical wetlabs, and conventions at discounted rates
Free legal advisory for professional practice regulations and compliance
Listing in official PAHA directory discoverable by pet owners
Exclusive hotel deals at PAHA events
PRC-accredited CPD units at membership meetings
Official PAHA plaque, wall sticker, and digital badge
Emergency and routine referral network access

types.name: Regular Membership
types.description: For licensed veterinarians representing companion animal clinics
types.eligibility: Licensed PRC veterinarian representing a registered animal clinic

types.name: Associate Membership
types.description: For individual veterinarians not representing clinics
types.eligibility: Licensed PRC veterinarian not representing a clinic

types.name: Institutional Membership
types.description: For veterinary hospitals, schools, and large institutions

types.name: Affiliate Membership
types.description: For partners, suppliers, and allied professionals
types.eligibility: Business or professional allied to veterinary medicine

steps.name: Check Qualifications
steps.description: Ensure you meet eligibility requirements for your chosen membership type

steps.name: Submit Application
steps.description: Complete online application form and upload required documents

steps.name: Email Verification
steps.description: Verify your email address via verification link

steps.name: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Settle the application fee after email verification

steps.name: Approval & Activation
steps.description: Receive approval notification and gain full member access

renewal.notifications: Automatic reminders sent via member notifications system

overview.name: PAHA Clinic Accreditation Program
overview.description: Formal recognition program validating veterinary clinics against the 2026 PAHA Accreditation Standard
PAHA offers workshops, seminars, conventions, and CPE programs

membership.question: How long does membership approval take?
membership.answer: Typically 2-4 weeks after a complete application is received and documents are verified.

membership.question: What are the membership fees?
membership.answer: Regular: ₱5,000 first year, Associate: ₱3,500, Institutional: ₱10,000, Affiliate: ₱4,500. Renewal is ₱2,000/year for all types.

membership.question: Can I change my membership type?
membership.answer: Yes, contact PAHA admin to discuss membership type changes and any applicable fee adjustments.

accreditation.question: How long is accreditation valid?
accreditation.answer: Accreditation is valid for 3 years from the date of approval.

accreditation.question: What if I fail a category during review?
accreditation.answer: You'll receive specific remarks for each non-compliant category. Fix the issues and resubmit documents.

accreditation.question: Do I need to be a member before applying for accreditation?
accreditation.answer: Yes, membership approval is required before accessing the accreditation system.

general.question: How do I contact PAHA?
general.answer: Email: secretariat@phaa.org.ph, Phone: +63 2 8955 1234, Office: 46 Pres. Quezon St., Marikina City, Mon-Fri 8AM-5PM

general.question: How do I reset my password?
general.answer: Click 'Forgot password?' on the login page, enter your email, and check your inbox for a reset link.
